tasks.title: Setup Project Structure
tasks.description: Create the initial project structure with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files
tasks.details:
Create the following files:
1. index.html - Main HTML file with calculator structure
2. styles.css - CSS file for styling
3. script.js - JavaScript file for calculator logic

HTML structure should include:
- Calculator container div
- Display area
- Button grid for numbers 0-9
- Operation buttons (+, -, *, /)
- Decimal point button
- Clear button
- Equals button

Setup basic CSS to create a centered calculator with a grid layout for buttons.
tasks.testStrategy: Manually verify that all files are created correctly and the basic structure renders in a browser. Ensure the calculator has a clean, minimalist design as specified in the PRD.

tasks.title: Implement Calculator Display
tasks.description: Create the display component that shows current input and calculation results
tasks.details:
In the HTML, create a dedicated display element with appropriate styling.

In CSS:
- Style the display with large, easy-to-read font
- Add appropriate padding and margins
- Ensure text aligns to the right
- Add overflow handling for large numbers

In JavaScript:
- Create a function to update the display
- Initialize display with '0'

```javascript
// Example display update function
function updateDisplay(value) {
  document.getElementById('display').textContent = value;
}
```
tasks.testStrategy: Test that the display initializes correctly with '0'. Verify that the display is readable and properly styled according to the UI/UX considerations in the PRD. Test overflow handling with very large numbers.

tasks.title: Implement Number Input Handling
tasks.description: Create functionality to handle numeric button inputs (0-9)
tasks.testStrategy: Test clicking each number button and verify the display updates correctly. Test sequences of number inputs to ensure they concatenate properly. Test that leading zeros are handled appropriately.

tasks.title: Implement Decimal Point Functionality
tasks.description: Add support for decimal point input to enable floating-point calculations
tasks.testStrategy: Test adding a decimal point to numbers. Verify that multiple decimal points cannot be added to the same number. Test calculations with decimal numbers to ensure proper floating-point arithmetic.

tasks.title: Implement Basic Arithmetic Operations
tasks.description: Create functionality for addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division operations
tasks.testStrategy: Test each arithmetic operation with various number combinations, including integers and decimals. Verify correct handling of division by zero. Test chaining multiple operations together.

tasks.title: Implement Equals Button Functionality
tasks.description: Create functionality to perform calculation when equals button is pressed
tasks.details:
In JavaScript:
1. Add event listener to the equals button
2. Call the calculate function when equals is pressed

```javascript
// Add event listener to equals button
document.querySelector('.equals-btn').addEventListener('click', calculate);
```

Ensure the calculate function properly handles edge cases:
- No operation selected
- Multiple equals presses
- Pressing equals immediately after an operation
tasks.testStrategy: Test pressing equals after entering a complete calculation (number, operation, number). Test pressing equals multiple times. Test pressing equals without selecting an operation or second operand.

tasks.title: Implement Clear Functionality
tasks.description: Add clear button to reset calculator state and display
tasks.testStrategy: Test that pressing clear resets the calculator to its initial state. Test clearing during different stages of calculation (after entering first number, after selecting operation, after calculation).

tasks.title: Implement Responsive Design
tasks.description: Ensure calculator works well on different screen sizes
tasks.testStrategy: Test the calculator on multiple devices (desktop, tablet, mobile) and browsers. Verify that the layout adjusts appropriately and all buttons remain accessible and usable on smaller screens.

tasks.title: Handle Edge Cases and Error Prevention
tasks.description: Implement error handling for edge cases like division by zero
tasks.testStrategy: Test division by zero and verify appropriate error message. Test calculations that could result in floating-point precision issues. Test entering very long numbers to ensure proper handling of display limitations.

tasks.title: Final Testing and Deployment
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive testing and deploy the calculator to a web hosting service
tasks.details:
1. Conduct thorough testing of all calculator functions:
   - Test all number inputs
   - Test all operations
   - Test decimal functionality
   - Test clear functionality
   - Test edge cases

2. Optimize code:
   - Minify CSS and JavaScript
   - Optimize images if any
   - Check for any performance issues

3. Deploy to web hosting:
   - Prepare files for deployment
   - Upload to a static web hosting service (e.g., GitHub Pages, Netlify)
   - Verify the deployed application works correctly

4. Document any known issues or limitations for future enhancements
tasks.testStrategy: Perform end-to-end testing of all calculator functionality. Test on multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and devices. Verify that the deployed version works identically to the development version.

tasks.title: Add Jest Testing and Pass All Tests
tasks.description: Set up Jest testing for the calculator app, refactor script.js for testability, write unit tests, and configure Jest/Babel to ensure tests pass.
